name: merlin
title: merlin

commands.name: merlinserver
commands.raw_help:
root@kali:~# merlinserver -h
 Usage of ./merlin:
 -addr string
   	The address to listen on for client connections (default "127.0.0.1:50051")
 -debug
   	Enable debug logging
 -extra
   	Enable extra debug logging
 -password string
   	the password to for CLI RPC clients to connect to this server (default "merlin")
 -secure
   	Require client TLS certificate verification
 -tlsCA string
   	TLS Certificate Authority file path to verify client certificates
 -tlsCert string
   	TLS certificate file path
 -tlsKey string
   	TLS private key file path
 -trace
   	Enable trace logging
 -version
   	Print the version number and exit

binary_metadata.file_type: POSIX shell script, ASCII text executable

apt_metadata.description:
Command & Control server & agent (metapackage)
This package contains a cross-platform post-exploitation HTTP/2 Command &
Control server and agent written in golang as well as an
identification tool.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use merlinserver because ### golang-github-ne0nd0g-merlin-dev.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair merlinserver with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `merlinserver --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: ### golang-github-ne0nd0g-merlin-dev.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install merlin
Install with: sudo apt install merlin
